title: A Quick Poll
content:
*Which "blog" format would the readers prefer?*

# Display short excerpts of several entries on the first page with "Read more ..." to continue reading the whole entry. (Something similar to what "pa~gung":http://www.evilgodzilla.com/gung/ is doing.)
# Display a set of  several full entries on the first page with "Post comment ..." for posting/reading readers' comments. (Something similar to what "jaam":http://onlineblog.netfirms.com/ is doing.)
# Display -full entries- +one full entry+ with comments and the comment form on each page. (What you're seeing right now.)

I'd also appreciate a short reason for your response. Your opinions are valuable for my future redesign. * hint hint * ;)

Thank you and Have a good day!

FYI: It's HOT again in Bangkok. --"
